cases.claim_boundary: Bounded real Enzyme/LLVM reverse-mode AD execution: scalar, vector and 2x2/3x3 matrix C kernels differentiated by the installed Enzyme pass and run natively, with the toolchain gradient checked against the analytic reference within float64 tolerance; no Enzyme-JAX, arbitrary-program, provider, hardware or performance claim.
